uplink.description: Full uplink: soil probe (VWC, temperature, EC) + battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (Decentlab v2, device id 4307, flags 0x0003). Soil-probe and battery words chosen to land at VWC=0.2501002 m³/m³, soil temp 22.5 °C, EC 1200 µS/cm, battery 3.2 V; expected values are the normalized mapping of the upstream reference decoder's output (VWC fraction ×100 -> %, EC µS/cm /1000 -> dS/m).

uplink.description: Full uplink: low moisture, cool soil, low EC, lower battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (flags 0x0003) at VWC=0.0499438 m³/m³, soil temp 5 °C, EC 350 µS/cm, battery 3.1 V; expected = normalized mapping of the upstream reference decoder output.
Synthetic battery-only payload (flags 0x0002); battery word 3200 -> 3.2 V. No soil block present, so no soil.* keys are emitted.
Synthetic negative case: version byte 1 instead of 2; the decoder rejects non-v2 protocol payloads.
